title: EmpireRegistry
description: Schema for the canonical Shadow Empire instance registry. Defines the machine identity, hardware profile, runtime modes, director estate, skill estate, provider registry, route registry, policy registry, knowledge plane, and feature flags for this deployment.

empire_id.description: Unique identifier for this empire deployment instance

empire_name.description: Human-readable name for this empire deployment

phase.description: Current build phase of the empire

hardware_class.description: Hardware class of the current operator machine

active_directors.description: List of currently active director identities
